text.title: Solo X Analytics Review Decision Tree
text.summary: Run-or-skip gate based on preconditions, then a second-level question routing to a rule-id conclusion. Minimum-form tree for a methodology of this shape.

decision-tree.root-question: Are 4+ weeks of analytics data + posting log available?

branch.question: Are any posts in the last week ≥3x trailing-4w-median impressions?

branch.conclusion: Run outlier post-mortem; name next-week experiment based on the variable observed.
Mark 'no outlier this week'; still draft one experiment from observed baseline patterns.
Skip this methodology. Need 4 weeks of data before the 3x-rule applies.

text.example: weeks=6 median=41k top=82k (2.0x) outlier_strict=no → draft next-week experiment per r4 (no outlier this week).
